verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a place for all the weak & weary. A place where all may find real peace. In the upper room with Jesus, All our cares and heartaches cease.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In the upper room with Jesus. Sitting at His nail-scarred feet. Oh, what rich and full communion! Fellowship, divine and sweet!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is cooling water for the weary. There's a balm for every broken heart. And there's rest for all the heavy-laden. His peace to you He will impart.
